metadata.description: Community marketplace for n8n-as-code Claude Code plugin releases. The plugin name stays user-facing as n8n-as-code; n8nac is kept as the CLI alias.

plugins.name: n8n-as-code
plugins.description: Expert n8n workflow engineering skill for Claude Code. Uses the n8nac CLI and the n8n-as-code knowledge base to search nodes, inspect schemas, and generate TypeScript workflows.
